column1: Physical-AI Studio — SOTA Policies (build / refactor / watch)

Single source of truth. Filter by Action (Build/Refactor/Evaluate/Watch), Status, Family, or Capability axis. Only SOTA policies to implement or stay aware of — already-shipped models (pi0.5, pi0, ACT, SmolVLA) are excluded unless there's an action (GR00T refactor). Closed/API-only = Watch (cannot implement). Snapshot: 11 Jun 2026.
